event_zh: Geoffrey Huntley 发布 Ralph Wiggum 技术，开创 Agent 自主循环模式
event_en: Geoffrey Huntley releases the Ralph Wiggum technique, pioneering the agent autonomous loop pattern

event_zh: OpenAI 开始内部 Harness Engineering 实验，5 个月构建百万行代码
event_en: OpenAI begins internal Harness Engineering experiments, building 1 million lines of code in 5 months

event_zh: Mitchell Hashimoto 发布 'My AI Adoption Journey'，首次系统命名 Harness Engineering
event_en: Mitchell Hashimoto publishes 'My AI Adoption Journey', first systematic naming of Harness Engineering

event_zh: OpenAI 发布 'Harness engineering: leveraging Codex in an agent-first world'
event_en: OpenAI publishes 'Harness engineering: leveraging Codex in an agent-first world'

event_zh: LangChain 发布 Harness Engineering 改进报告，Terminal Bench 2.0 从 Top 30 跃升至 Top 5
event_en: LangChain publishes Harness Engineering improvement report, jumping from Top 30 to Top 5 on Terminal Bench 2.0

event_zh: Birgitta Böckeler 在 Martin Fowler 博客发布 Harness Engineering 深度分析
event_en: Birgitta Böckeler publishes in-depth Harness Engineering analysis on Martin Fowler's blog

event_zh: Cassie Kozyrkov 发布 'Harness Engineering: How to Supervise Code You Can't Read'
event_en: Cassie Kozyrkov publishes 'Harness Engineering: How to Supervise Code You Can't Read'

event_zh: AutoJunjie/awesome-agent-harness 仓库创建，社区开始系统整理资源
event_en: AutoJunjie/awesome-agent-harness repository created, community begins systematic resource organization

event_zh: LangChain 发布 'The Anatomy of an Agent Harness'
event_en: LangChain publishes 'The Anatomy of an Agent Harness'

event_zh: HumanLayer 发布 'Skill Issue: Harness Engineering for Coding Agents'
event_en: HumanLayer publishes 'Skill Issue: Harness Engineering for Coding Agents'

event_zh: Anthropic 发布 'Harness design for long-running application development'
event_en: Anthropic publishes 'Harness design for long-running application development'

event_zh: 卡颂（kasong2048）发布系列推文，在中文社区深度传播 Harness Engineering
event_en: kasong2048 publishes a series of tweets, deeply propagating Harness Engineering in the Chinese community
